svg.title: Yaver
svg.desc: Yaver is an open-source, self-hostable MCP server. Your coding agent builds a full-stack app on your own machine, the app hot-reloads on your real phone, and you keep fixing it from inside the running app.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, PingFang SC, sans-serif
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, PingFang SC, sans-serif
